_comment: Curated catalogue of common fungal phylogenetic PCR primers. Every pair carries a primary-literature source, full citation, and reference URL/DOI. rDNA primers cross-checked against the UNITE primer table (https://unite.ut.ee/primers.php). User-added pairs live separately in ~/.phylofetch/primers.json and are merged on top of this catalogue at runtime.

ITS1/ITS4.citation: White TJ, Bruns T, Lee S, Taylor J (1990) Amplification and direct sequencing of fungal ribosomal RNA genes for phylogenetics. In: PCR Protocols: A Guide to Methods and Applications. Academic Press, San Diego, pp 315-322.

ITS1F/ITS4.citation: Gardes M, Bruns TD (1993) ITS primers with enhanced specificity for basidiomycetes - application to the identification of mycorrhizae and rusts. Molecular Ecology 2: 113-118. ITS4 from White et al. 1990.

ITS5/ITS4.citation: White TJ, Bruns T, Lee S, Taylor J (1990) Amplification and direct sequencing of fungal ribosomal RNA genes for phylogenetics. In: PCR Protocols: A Guide to Methods and Applications. Academic Press, San Diego, pp 315-322.

NS1/NS4.citation: White TJ, Bruns T, Lee S, Taylor J (1990) Amplification and direct sequencing of fungal ribosomal RNA genes for phylogenetics. In: PCR Protocols: A Guide to Methods and Applications. Academic Press, San Diego, pp 315-322.

LR0R/LR5.source: Vilgalys & Hester 1990 (LR series); LR0R per Vilgalys lab
LR0R/LR5.citation: Vilgalys R, Hester M (1990) Rapid genetic identification and mapping of enzymatically amplified ribosomal DNA from several Cryptococcus species. Journal of Bacteriology 172: 4238-4246. LR primer set maintained at the Vilgalys lab.

NL1/NL4.citation: O'Donnell K (1993) Fusarium and its near relatives. In: Reynolds DR, Taylor JW (eds) The Fungal Holomorph: Mitotic, Meiotic and Pleomorphic Speciation in Fungal Systematics. CAB International, Wallingford, pp 225-233.

EF1-728F/EF1-986R.citation: Carbone I, Kohn LM (1999) A method for designing primer sets for speciation studies in filamentous ascomycetes. Mycologia 91: 553-556.

EF1-526F/EF1-1567R.citation: Rehner SA, Buckley E (2005) A Beauveria phylogeny inferred from nuclear ITS and EF1-alpha sequences: evidence for cryptic diversification and links to Cordyceps teleomorphs. Mycologia 97: 84-98.

fRPB2-5F/fRPB2-7cR.citation: Liu YJ, Whelen S, Hall BD (1999) Phylogenetic relationships among ascomycetes: evidence from an RNA polymerase II subunit. Molecular Biology and Evolution 16: 1799-1808.

RPB1-Af/RPB1-Cr.citation: Stiller JW, Hall BD (1997) The origin of red algae: implications for plastid evolution. PNAS 94: 4520-4525 (RPB1-Af, forward). Matheny PB, Liu YJ, Ammirati JF, Hall BD (2002) Using RPB1 sequences to improve phylogenetic inference among mushrooms (Inocybe, Agaricales). American Journal of Botany 89: 688-698 (RPB1-Cr, reverse). Outermost fwd/rev of the Matheny-lab RPB1 set (A-C region); in-silico amplicon window deliberately widened beyond the wet-lab product to span the full genomic region including introns.

fRPB2-5F/bRPB2-11R1.source: Liu et al. 1999 (fRPB2-5F); Matheny et al. 2007 (bRPB2-11R1)
fRPB2-5F/bRPB2-11R1.citation: Liu YJ, Whelen S, Hall BD (1999) Phylogenetic relationships among ascomycetes: evidence from an RNA polymerase II subunit. Molecular Biology and Evolution 16: 1799-1808 (fRPB2-5F, forward; domain 5). Matheny PB, Wang Z, Binder M, et al. (2007) Contributions of rpb2 and tef1 to the phylogeny of mushrooms and allies (Basidiomycota, Fungi). Molecular Phylogenetics and Evolution 43: 430-451 (bRPB2-11R1, reverse; domain 11). Outermost fwd (domain 5) + rev (domain 11) of the Matheny-lab RPB2 set, spanning the full RPB2 region; in-silico amplicon window deliberately widened beyond the wet-lab nested products including introns.

BT2a/BT2b.citation: Glass NL, Donaldson GC (1995) Development of primer sets designed for use with the PCR to amplify conserved genes from filamentous ascomycetes. Applied and Environmental Microbiology 61: 1323-1330.

ACT-512F/ACT-783R.citation: Carbone I, Kohn LM (1999) A method for designing primer sets for speciation studies in filamentous ascomycetes. Mycologia 91: 553-556.

CAL-228F/CAL-737R.citation: Carbone I, Kohn LM (1999) A method for designing primer sets for speciation studies in filamentous ascomycetes. Mycologia 91: 553-556.

H3-1a/H3-1b.citation: Glass NL, Donaldson GC (1995) Development of primer sets designed for use with the PCR to amplify conserved genes from filamentous ascomycetes. Applied and Environmental Microbiology 61: 1323-1330.

GPD1/GPD2.citation: Templeton MD, Rikkerink EHA, Solon SL, Crowhurst RN (1992) Cloning and molecular characterization of the glyceraldehyde-3-phosphate dehydrogenase-encoding gene and cDNA from the plant pathogenic fungus Glomerella cingulata. Gene 122: 225-230.
